description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in sleek black material, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The seat and backrest are divided into two sections, each with subtle button tufting for added visual interest. Two decorative throw pillows with a geometric pattern in beige and dark tones are placed symmetrically on either side, providing a contrast to the solid black upholstery. The armrests are straight and angular, matching the overall contemporary design, and the sofa stands on four short, blocky legs with a metallic finish. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, emphasizing its clean lines. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern offices, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A sleek, black two-seater sofa with straight armrests, button-tufted back cushions, and two geometric-patterned throw pillows. The design is modern and minimalist, with metallic block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two seat and back cushions, button tufting, and two patterned throw pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight armrest, cushion thickness, and pillow placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and two attached back cushions, both uniform in size with subtle button tufting; two loose, patterned throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, with a flat profile and no visible padding or decorative elements, matching the sofa's upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at each corner, featuring a metallic finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest divided into two segments, each with a single button tuft; continuous and attached to the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, glossy finish and subtle button tufting on the back cushions; throw pillows feature a bold geometric pattern in beige and dark tones.
